calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Moore for petitioner Patricia Brown (via Zoom).
Melissa Chung, special administrator in pro per (via Zoom).
Bryon Swan and Tenishe Swan, interested parties (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court addressed issues concerning notice and publication. Mr. Moore stated that publication had been completed and that the corrected proof of publication reflecting Melissa Chung as the proposed administrator had been filed.

The Court reviewed the corrected proof of publication on the bench, noting the e-filing had been processed shortly before the hearing. The Court confirmed that Byron Swan had no objection to proceeding.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
